description_long: This bracelet features a series of matte black spherical beads forming the main band, interspersed with four faceted, semi-translucent grayish-blue beads that add a touch of contrast and sophistication. At the center, a prominent, textured red bead encrusted with small, raised nodules serves as the focal point, drawing attention with its vibrant color and intricate surface. The overall design is circular and elastic, suggesting it is meant to stretch slightly for easy wear. The combination of smooth and faceted surfaces, along with the central ornate bead, gives the piece a modern yet slightly playful aesthetic. The materials appear to be a mix of synthetic resin or plastic for the black and gray beads, and possibly a polymer clay or resin for the red central bead. This bracelet would be suitable for casual or semi-formal urban wear, adding a pop of color and texture to the wrist.
description: A circular bracelet with matte black beads, faceted grayish-blue beads, and a central textured red bead as the focal point. The design is modern and visually striking with a mix of smooth and ornate surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of black beads, four faceted grayish-blue beads, and the central textured red bead.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth and faceting of the grayish-blue beads and the raised texture of the red bead.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the uniform matte black beads, with the central red bead visible at the far side.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the transition between the black beads and the faceted grayish-blue beads, with the red bead partially visible.
